name: browser
description: Real-browser QA: smoke-test core flows, catch console/network/hydration errors, review layout & responsiveness, test mobile breakpoints, and test forms end to end. Skill: browser-qa-engineer. Commands: /browser:smoke-test, /browser:console-errors, /browser:visual-check, /browser:mobile-test, /browser:form-submit-test. Safety contract: localhost/staging/test-tenant by default, synthetic data only, confirmation before production or side-effecting submissions; smoke-test and form-submit-test are manual-only.
